text.title: Audience OKR Template (Indie) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Audience OKR Template (Indie).

example.scenario: Indie founder of a $5K MRR SaaS targeting solo founders. Q2 Objective: 'make paid the obvious upgrade'. KRs: trial→paid 0.18→0.25, weekly-active 0.42→0.60, M2-retention 0.70→0.80. Monday check-in; June-30 grading.

artefact.code: { "artefact_id": "okr-indie-2026-q2", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "segment": "solo-founder-paid", "quarter": "2026-Q2", "objective": "Make solo-founder paid tier the obvious upgrade after free trial", "key_results": [ { "id": "kr1", "type": "growth", "metric": "trial\u2192paid", "target": 0.25, "current": 0.18, "status": "on-track" }, { "id": "kr2", "type": "engagement", "metric": "weekly active %", "target": 0.6, "current": 0.42, "status": "at-risk" }, { "id": "kr3", "type": "retention", "metric": "M2 retention", "target": 0.8, "current": 0.7, "status": "on-track" } ], "check_in_day": "Monday", "grading_date": "2026-06-30", "owner": "@ruslan" }
